economic_notes: Nation has extensive government business enterprise portfolio including Tagi Contracting LP, Tin Toh Forest Products LLP, Tagi Resources LP, Tagi Forestry LP, Tagi Tatuk Resort LP, Tagi Blackwater Services LP, and related corporations. Equity income of $926,621 recorded from Tagi Contracting LP ($282,724) and Tin Toh Forest Products LLP ($643,897). Nation also contingently liable for $240,000 line of credit and $100,000 lease facility for Tin Toh Forest Products LLP. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP distributions received. Pathways Forward program generated large surplus due to Carrier Sekani Tribal Council transfers of $11.5M.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). 16 government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $6,480,503 + CMHC $1,799,784 + Carrier Sekani Family Services $1,013,488 + Carrier Sekani Tribal Council $12,770,612 + PGNAETA $305,475 + Province of BC $165,333 + Ottawa Trust Fund $31,955 = $22,567,150; OSR calculated as total revenue $26,427,388 minus government transfers $22,551,377 (excluding equity income $926,621) = $3,876,011. Pathways Forward segment shows large surplus of $9.3M primarily from $11.5M Carrier Sekani Tribal Council funding. Accumulated surplus of $60.18M includes $26.1M invested in tangible capital assets, $975K Ottawa Trust Funds, $177K Treaty, and $32.9M operating fund surplus. No schedule of remuneration provided in document.
